title: Glossary Entry
description: Schema for a trust-first glossary entry with review, citations, and course routing.

reviewedBy.description: Named expert reviewer responsible for the current published version.

title.description: Professional title or role of the reviewer.

credentials.description: Credentials that establish why this reviewer is qualified to sign the page.

organisation.description: Organisation the reviewer represents when signing the page.

citation.description: Primary or supporting source used to substantiate claims on the page.

label.description: Short label used to reference the citation from body sections.

url.description: Working URL for the cited source.

retrieved_date.description: Date the source was retrieved for checking.

supporting_quote.description: Short quotation or extract showing the relevant supporting language from the source.

courseRouting.description: Course or offer route surfaced when a user needs next-step guidance.

title.description: Display title of the routed course or learning path.

url.description: Working URL for the routed offer.

provider.description: Provider responsible for delivering the course or pathway.

audience.description: Short description of the intended learner or buyer audience.

provenance.description: Auditable record of authorship, review timing, and fact-check outcome.

authored_by.description: Name or role that authored the draft version of the page.

author_type.description: Whether the initial draft was produced by a human or an agent.

reviewed_at.description: Timestamp for the most recent completed human review.

fact_check_passed.description: Whether the page passed the hard fact-checking gate.

acronym.description: Optional acronym or abbreviation for the term.

regulatory_context.description: Optional note on the framework or context where the term is used.

seen_in_examples.description: Short examples of where a reader may encounter the term.

related_terms.description: Cross-links to related glossary term slugs.

related_courses.description: Courses or learning paths surfaced from this term.

last_updated.description: Date the entry was last updated.

citations.description: Sources used to support the definition and context.
